---
title: "Anreg Project Kelompok 2 - 2025"
author: "Daffa Faaiz Al-Zakkii"
date: "2026-04-28"
output: rmdformats::downcute
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(car)
library(lmtest)
library(reshape2)
```

# Data

```{r}
data <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\ACER\\OneDrive\\Dokumen\\AnregData.xlsx", sheet="2025")
head(data)
```
```{r}
str(data)
```

# Statistika Deskpritif

```{r}
summary(data)
data.frame(
  Mean = sapply(data[, -1], mean), 
  Median = sapply(data[, -1], median), 
  SD = sapply(data[, -1], sd), 
  Min = sapply(data[, -1], min), 
  Max = sapply(data[, -1], max) 
)
```

# Histogram

```{r}
library(reshape2) 
library(ggplot2)
data_long <- melt(data[, -1])
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_histogram(color = "black", bins = 10, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Histogram Seluruh Variabel",
    x = "Nilai",
    y = "Frekuensi"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14) 
  ) 
```

# Boxplot

```{r}
library(reshape2) 
library(ggplot2)
```


```{r}
data_long <- melt(data[, -1])
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot Seluruh Variabel",
    x = "Variabel",
    y = "Nilai"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

# Scatter Plot

```{r}
library(reshape2) 
library(ggplot2)
data_long <- melt(data[, -1], id.vars = "PM 2.5")
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = value, y = `PM 2.5`)) +
  geom_point(color = "#3949AB", alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#E53935", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Hubungan Variabel Prediktor dengan PM 2.5",
       x = "Variabel Prediktor",
       y = "PM 2.5") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

# Matriks Korelasi

```{r}
cor_matrix <- cor(data[, -1])  # Gapake variabel Provinsi
cor_matrix
corrplot(cor_matrix,
         method = "color",
         type = "upper",
         addCoef.col = "black",
         tl.col = "black",
         col = colorRampPalette(c("#D32F2F", "white", "#1976D2"))(200),
         number.cex = 0.7)
```

# Model

```{r}
model <- lm(`PM 2.5` ~ `Luas Kebakaran Hutan` + `Kendaraan Bermotor` + 
            `Kepadatan Penduduk` + `Curah Hujan` + Suhu + `Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi`, data=data)
summary(model)
```

# Uji Kenormalan Residual

```{r}
shapiro.test(residuals(model))
```

```{r}
qqnorm(residuals(model))
qqline(residuals(model), col = "red")
```

# Homoskedastisitas

```{r}
library(lmtest)
bptest(model)
```

# Independensi Residual

```{r}
dwtest(model)
```

# Multikolinearitas

```{r}
library(car)
vif(model)
```

# Outlier

```{r}
rstudent(model)
```

```{r}
plot(model, which = 1)
```

# Leverage
```{r}
hatvalues(model)
```

```{r}
plot(model, which = 5)
```

```{r}
n <- nrow(data)
2 * (5 + 1) / n
```

# Cook's Distance

```{r}
cooks.distance(model)
```

```{r}
plot(model, which = 4)
```
